issues.description: SearchDeck action is missing required parameters: 'count' (should be 5 cards to look at), 'filter' does not specify the type condition (must include 'Whitebeard Pirates' type), and does not exclude '[Izo]'. The action also does not account for placing remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order.

Effect structure incomplete. The card effect has two distinct phases: (1) search and reveal up to 1 card matching type filter, and (2) arrange remaining cards at bottom of deck. Current DSL only implements a basic SearchDeck without the reveal, count, type filtering, name exclusion, or bottom-deck placement mechanics.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" other than [Izo] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
